privacy.title: Privacy Policy and Data Processing
privacy.subtitle: Applicable regulations: General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)
privacy.intro: The development team recognizes the fundamental importance of privacy and the protection of personal data. This policy establishes the principles by which we govern the processing of information, ensuring maximum transparency and respect for the rights of our users.

nature.title: 1. Nature of Processing
nature.content: The data collected through this platform is exclusively aimed at continuously improving the educational experience and interaction with the Artificial Intelligence assistant. All information is processed under the principles of lawfulness, fairness, transparency, and data minimization, in accordance with Article 5 of the GDPR.

data.title: 2. Data Collected
data.content: During the use of the platform, we strictly limit the collection to the following essential data:
data.idDesc: Name, institutional email, and unique identifier assigned by the authentication system.
data.interactionsDesc: History of conversations with the virtual assistant in order to provide accurate memory context.
data.metricsDesc: Anonymized analytical data (processed remotely) intended to understand usage patterns and evaluate the technical performance of the application.

rights.title: 3. Exercise of Rights (ARCO Rights)
rights.content: Under current legislation, you have the right to exercise your right to be forgotten at any time. The platform integrates user autonomy tools; specifically, from the Settings section, you can execute the permanent and irreversible deletion of your entire account and all linked records, without requiring administrative intervention on our part.

security.title: 4. Security and Integrity
security.content: The integrity of your data is guaranteed by the security architecture of Firebase (Google Cloud Platform), which has international certifications for encryption both in transit and at rest. However, the user is explicitly advised to refrain from disclosing highly confidential data (such as bank credentials or medical information) during consultations with the Artificial Intelligence assistant.

C.name: Computing
C.description: Deepen your knowledge in the mathematical and algorithmic foundations of computer science. Master Artificial Intelligence, advanced algorithm design, and complex system optimization.
C.whyChoose: If you are passionate about solving complex problems, understanding how languages work under the hood, and building AI from scratch.

EC.name: Computer Engineering
EC.description: Connect the software world with electronics. Design microprocessor architectures, embedded systems, IoT, and learn to squeeze the most out of hardware performance.
EC.whyChoose: If you want to understand how a computer really works and design the devices that will connect the world of the future.

ES.name: Software Engineering
ES.description: Specialize in the complete lifecycle of large software systems. Learn architecture, project management, quality assurance, and agile methodologies.
ES.whyChoose: If your goal is to lead teams, design scalable architectures, and build high-impact software products.

SI.name: Information Systems
SI.description: Align technology with business strategies. Learn to design, integrate, and audit complex enterprise information systems maximizing corporate value.
SI.whyChoose: If you have a business vision and want to be the bridge between strategic management and technological implementation.
benefits: Management of large corporate data volumes

TI.name: Information Technologies
TI.description: Master the deployment, configuration, and maintenance of technological infrastructures. Be an expert in networking, cybersecurity, operating systems, and service integration.
TI.whyChoose: If you enjoy ethical hacking, telecommunications network design, and managing large cloud servers.
benefits: Fundamental in the Cloud Computing era
